title: Pan-Seared Sea Bass with Sweet Treat Glaze
description: A flavorful and healthy sea bass recipe with a sweet and sticky glaze, perfect for a gluten-free dinner.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and place a wire rack on top.
Season the sea bass fillets with salt and pepper.
Place the fillets on the wire rack and bake for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
While the fish is baking, mix together the honey, lemon juice, brown sugar, and garlic powder in a small bowl.
After the fish has cooked for 8 minutes, brush the glaze all over the top of the fillets.
Return the fish to the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the glaze is caramelized.
Remove the fish from the oven and serve immediately.
Serve with your choice of sides, such as roasted vegetables or quinoa.
Enjoy your delicious and healthy sea bass with sweet treat glaze!
